text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head up to the roof to have a lunch meeting
with Maruzensky. Suddenly, we hear a small cry
nearby.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's that voice?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: What are you doing there, Rice?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Maruzensky!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, um, well... I'm the last robber, you see...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I ask her about it, she tells us that she's
playing cops and robbers with her friends, and
she's the last robber left.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
If I go to help, I might get caught! But I don't
want to let my team down since they invited me
to play...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ahh, I see. So you're worried you might lose.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky looks down at what appears to be
the "jail" near the center of the courtyard.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Rice, how many cops are there?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Umm... I think there's only one...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, perfect! Let an old hand give you a surefire
strategy, then! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Would you prefer the more physical Plan A or the
strategic Plan B?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I have to choose?! Err... well...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, which do you think is better?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: All righty, then! ♪ Let's go with Plan A!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Keep the cop right on your tail, and make them
chase you until they run out of energy!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Do you think I'll be able to m-manage that?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm sure you can! I know how strong you are, Rice.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You're a hard worker, and I'm really proud of your
perseverance.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
With the Maruzen seal of approval, rest assured
you've got this in the bag!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Your seal of approval...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll... I'll do it!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! This game gives me an idea for some
good stamina training! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, we watch from the rooftop as Rice
Shower successfully saves her friends.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
All righty, then! ♪ Let's go with the more tactical
Plan B!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Lure the cop toward the school buildings, then
lose them in a dead end!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: D-do you really think I can do that?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Sure you can! You're great at planning and
strategy, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she says this, Maruzensky holds Rice Shower's
hands tightly.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's going to be fine if you keep a cool head and
think things through, okay?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Okay! I'll... I'll do it!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I should probably follow my own advice
now that I've said it, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, we watch from the rooftop as Rice
Shower successfully saves her friends.
